original: textify(a||(a=(0,l.Z)(["The Casstech’s pneumatic boarding ramp is a design as old as the very first ships to reach for the stars, though this one comes with every modern adornment one could ask for thanks to a modern retrofit. Pop out stairs allow for easy on-foot climbing. Gleaming steripaint coats every exposed surface to prevent rust, staining, the biohazards that can fester in old, unwashed ships. A state-of-the-art control panel with morphic hardlight toggles allows for a high degree of granularity when operating it. More importantly, it allows you to lock your vessel with a high degree of confidence and customization.\n\n\t\tThe Casstech Z14’s central access corridor stretches north, through the belly of the vessel. You may exit your ship here."])))

textify(n||(n=(0,l.Z)(["Straddling the central access corridor is the Casstech’s helm. Accessible by a short ladder, it sits high enough to look out into the black over the vessel’s tapered nose. Arcing windows offer nearly 180 degrees of horizontal viewspace, with more positioned overhead. The more modern sensor suite makes the view redundant, but nice.\n\n\t\tThe access corridor below offers access to the captain’s quarters to the east, a security console to the north, a utility room to the west, and the aft boarding room to the south."])))

textify(i||(i=(0,l.Z)(["The utility room is home to a large number of breakers, a fire suppression system, and enough connections to power a small machine shop - or cramped arcade. It is the perfect place to install any devices that require connection to a power main but are too small to take up one of your ship’s upgrade slots.\n\n\t\tA doorway to the east leads to the helm. Next to it, a cramped ladder leads to the lower deck, where upgrade modules and crew living quarters are installed. There is no reason for you to venture down there",""])),crew(!0,!1)>0?", and your crew can be accessed using the security console to the northeast.":".")

textify(s||(s=(0,l.Z)(["The captain’s quarters got an even more thorough update than the rest of the ship. Polished hardwood harvested from one of the few grow-ops on Terra herself forms the nightstand. The mattress is made from the newest smart-foam and already connected to an app on your Codex. It can be as soft as a feather or as firm as a prick while remaining comfortably breathable. As a bonus, it can squeeze out any fluids that soak into it with the press of a button. A small bathroom and shower provides you with a place to clean up while not wasting much of your starship’s valuable space.\n\n\t\tA doorway to the west provides access to the central corridor and the helm above."])))

textify(r||(r=(0,l.Z)(["Your security console is actually a holo-table - one you recognize from a tour of a Steele Tech outpost Dad took you on when you were little. This is a slightly scaled down version of what you saw in that office, but the functions are the same: a holographic display capable of outputting in both 2 and 3D, allowing you to access fully realized views of the rooms in your ship with ease. It even tracks the life signs of every person onboard - like the glowing green dot that marks where you stand right now. You can use this station to locate and interact with your crew.\n\n\t\tA doorway to the north leads to the storage lockers. The helm is just to the south."])))

textify(u||(u=(0,l.Z)(["The Casstech’s hold is not so voluminous as one you might find on a proper transport vessel or larger luxury yacht, but she’s got storage lockers where it counts, giving you enough space to stash some extra outfits, guns, toys, and whatever else you want to hold onto long term.

		You suppose you can always buy a bigger ship if you need more room...

		Just south of here is the security console. You can follow that central corridor even further south to the helm or the boarding ramp just beyond."])))
